prompt: Tower of Hanoi with 4 disks on three pegs A, B, C. All disks start on peg A (largest on the bottom). Move all disks to peg C, never placing a larger disk on a smaller one and moving one top disk at a time. Give the shortest sequence of moves, each move written as [from_peg, to_peg].
rationale: Discrete state-space planning (Apple-paper flavour). Text continuation degrades as the move count grows; explicit search produces a legal, optimal sequence.
